attributes.action: Lower Bus Fares for full-time students free, or cheaper
attributes.additional_details: Many students aren't in work, due to full time school-work and studying and are charged adult prices for many bus fares or other travel fees either to school, or just for travel purposes, which many students can struggle to fund on a regular basis, which can be necessary travel for many.
attributes.background: Lower the bus fares across the country for full-time students to allow for easy/easier access to travel and commuting

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
'Fund free bus travel for all post-16 students'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754450
